title: Looking for Category Manager at ixigo

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at ixigo
jsonLd.description:
Join the ixigo family as a Category Manager in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ixigo:
ixigo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ixigo!
